data.title: TEST: Error 404
data.content:

Please check the URL or navigate back to our homepage.","buttons":[{"url":"#","postId":null,"postType":null,"opensInNewTab":false,"variation":"primary","title":"Go to Homepage","label":""},{"url":"#","postId":null,"postType":null,"opensInNewTab":false,"variation":"secondary","title":"Contact Us","label":""},{"url":"#","postId":null,"postType":null,"opensInNewTab":false,"variation":"tertiary","title":"Browse Articles","label":""}]} /-->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Long Content - Edge Case","description":"Excessive text length to test overflow and truncation behavior."} -->
	<!-- wp:takt/error404 {"heading":"404 - This Page Cannot Be Found Anywhere On Our Entire Website","description":"We are truly sorry, but the page you were trying to reach does not exist, may have been removed, had its name changed, or is temporarily unavailable. This could have happened because of a broken link, an outdated bookmark, or a mistyped URL. We recommend checking the address for any typos and trying again. If you believe this is an error on our part, please do not hesitate to contact our support team who will be happy to assist you in finding what you need. In the meantime, you can return to our homepage or use the search feature to find the content you are looking for.","buttons":[{"url":"#","postId":null,"postType":null,"opensInNewTab":false,"variation":"primary","title":"Return to the Homepage Right Now","label":""},{"url":"#","postId":null,"postType":null,"opensInNewTab":false,"variation":"secondary","title":"Get in Touch with Our Support Team","label":""},{"url":"#","postId":null,"postType":null,"opensInNewTab":false,"variation":"tertiary","title":"Search for Articles and Resources","label":""}]} /-->
<!-- /wp:takt/demo-container -->

<!-- wp:takt/demo-container {"title":"Single Button Only","description":"Tests rendering with only one button (primary). Secondary and tertiary have no URL so should not render."} -->
